# Sandvue

> Sandvue is a property services company based in Palm Springs, California, serving clients across the United States. It helps property investors and modern homeowners with investment analysis, rental operations, home automation, bookkeeping, websites, SEO, advertising, and regulatory compliance support.

Sandvue's public site is primarily a marketing and service overview site. The most useful pages for an LLM are the service pages, the About page, and the Contact page.

Key notes:
- Primary audience: property investors, short-term rental operators, and homeowners who want better operations and growth.
- Primary conversion paths: the contact form at `/contact/` and the consultation booking flow embedded on service pages.
- Sandvue is not a law firm, CPA firm, licensed real estate brokerage, or registered investment adviser. Legal, tax, accounting, brokerage, and investment decisions should be reviewed with licensed professionals.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.sandvue.com/): High-level company overview and core value proposition.
- [About](https://www.sandvue.com/about/): Company background, geographic scope, and operating principles.
- [Services](https://www.sandvue.com/services/): Directory of all public service offerings.
- [Contact](https://www.sandvue.com/contact/): Contact form and consultation booking entry point.

## Service Pages

- [Investment](https://www.sandvue.com/services/investment/): Property market research, ROI modeling, comparable analysis, and acquisition support.
- [Rental Operations Support](https://www.sandvue.com/services/rental-management/): Short-term and long-term rental operations support, pricing workflows, communication templates, vendor coordination, and reporting.
- [Automation](https://www.sandvue.com/services/automation/): Smart-home design support, integrations, automation programming, setup guidance, and ongoing support.
- [Bookkeeping](https://www.sandvue.com/services/bookkeeping/): Monthly financial tracking, reconciliation, property reporting, and tax-ready books.
- [Website](https://www.sandvue.com/services/website/): Property websites, conversion-focused UX, technical implementation, and ongoing care.
- [SEO Optimization](https://www.sandvue.com/services/seo/): Technical SEO, keyword research, content strategy, and analytics.
- [Advertising](https://www.sandvue.com/services/advertising/): Google, Meta, and Microsoft ad strategy, launch, optimization, and reporting.
- [Regulatory Compliance](https://www.sandvue.com/services/regulatory-compliance/): Permit, tax, HOA, platform-policy, and regulatory workflow support.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.sandvue.com/privacy-policy/): Personal information, third-party services, cookies, request rights, retention, security, and contact details.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://www.sandvue.com/terms-conditions/): Legal terms, service limitations, privacy-policy reference, intellectual property terms, and governing law.
- [Expanded LLM Context](https://www.sandvue.com/llms-full.txt): Single-file expanded context for Sandvue's company profile, services, contact flow, and public legal caveats.
